gigapan.name: A gypsy wagon...
gigapan.description:
Or not really, but with a similar design. These wagons are all over, wherever there is a city work site. 2/3'rds of the wagon is a worker break and office area, I think I saw a little stove in one for heating, and the rest is tool and supply storage.

And the area to the lower right is Photoshop content aware fill - isn't technology magic?
